title: Selfie Pulla Lyrics Kaththi Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Selfie Pulla
Movie: Kaththi
Singer(s): Vijay, Sunidhi Chauhan
Lyrics: karky
Music: Anirudh

terra terra terraa bite-ah kadhal irukku
neeyum bit-u bit-u bit-ah
bite-u panna yerum kirukku (2)

Instagram-athula vaadi vazhalaam
namma vazhum nimishathellaam
suttu thallalaam.

Naanum neeyum serum podhu
thaaru maaruthaan
andha facebook-u pichikidum
like-u share-u thaan

let's take-a selfie pulla
gimme a ummah ummah
selfie pulla
gimme a ummah  (2)

let's take-a selfie pulla
selfie pulla
let's take-a selfie pulla
selfie pulla

Photoshop-u pannaalamaley
filter onnum pannaamale
un mugaththa paakkum podhe
nenjam alludhu.

dappakuththu paattum illa
dandanakka beat-um illa
unna paakkum podhu
rendu kaalum thulludhu.

Kuchchi ice-um illa
neevaavum illa
un per sonnaa naakkellaam
thiththikkudhu.

Ada thannikulla naan
mungum podhu
unna nenachaale engengo
paththikkudhu.

veralukku pasi eduthu
uyir thudikka- ulla
negam vachachi unna konjam
adhu kadikka.

udhadukku pasi eduthu
adam pidikka - nee
muththam onnu thaayen naanum
padam pidikka.

let's take-a selfie pulla
gimme a ummah ummah
selfie pulla
gimme a ummah ummah (2)

Kalayila kadhal solli
madhiyaanam thaali katti
saayingaalum thaenilavu
ponaa variyaa ?

dhegathula chocolateu naan
vegaththula rockettu naan
nilavula tent adippom
are you ready ya ?

ada rockettu onnu
neeyum rentu pannu
andha jupiter-il moon-u
mattum aruvathi moonu (63)

Andha nilavunga ellaam
inga thaevayilla
un kan rendu podhaadhaa
vaadi pulla

let's take-a selfie pulla
gimme a ummah ummah
selfie pulla
gimme a ummah

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Selfie Pulla'?

'Selfie Pulla' celebrates the joy of love in the age of social media, highlighting how relationships are influenced by platforms like Instagram and Facebook.

What is the context of the song in the movie 'Kaththi'?

In Kaththi, the song is a lively expression of romance, showcasing the playful chemistry between the lead characters amidst a backdrop of social issues.

Who are the singers and music director of 'Selfie Pulla'?

The song features the talented voices of Vijay and Sunidhi Chauhan, with music composed by the acclaimed Anirudh.

When was 'Selfie Pulla' released?

'Selfie Pulla' was released on September 18, 2014, as part of the soundtrack for Kaththi.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Selfie Pulla, the vibrant energy of the song reflects the playful and modern aspects of love, perfectly fitting the youthful vibe of Kaththi. The lyrics cleverly intertwine social media references with romantic sentiments, creating a relatable anthem for today's generation. The collaboration between Vijay and Sunidhi Chauhan brings a lively dynamic, making it a favorite for parties and celebrations. Overall, the song evokes feelings of joy and excitement, capturing the essence of contemporary romance.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Selfie Pulla from Kaththi is a vibrant anthem that perfectly captures the essence of modern romance and social media. With Anirudh's infectious beats and the dynamic vocals of Vijay and Sunidhi Chauhan, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the fun and energy that makes this track a must-listen for any celebration!
stanzaMeanings: There is love in the bite, you also bite, it feels like a fun game.
Let's enjoy our time on Instagram, we can have fun every moment.
When you and I come together, Facebook will go crazy with likes and shares.
Let's take a selfie, give me a kissy selfie, give me a kissy.
Let's take a selfie, selfie, let's take a selfie, selfie.
We can use Photoshop, but even without filters, your face makes my heart flutter.
Even without a dance or beat, when I see you, my heart skips a beat.
Without ice or you, just saying your name makes my heart race.
When I think of you, I feel like I'm floating somewhere.
Taking away hunger from others, I keep you close to my heart.
Taking away hunger from my heart, I want your kiss, I want to capture that moment.
Let's take a selfie, give me a kissy selfie, give me a kissy.
In the art of love, is it enough to just tie the knot?
In the body, chocolate, and in the speed, a rocket, shall we set up a tent under the moon? Are you ready?
You also rent a rocket, that moon on Jupiter is just a small moon.
Those moons are not needed here, just keep your two eyes on me, girl.
Let's take a selfie, give me a kissy selfie, give me a kissy.
